## Problem

What user, mentor, or contributor need does this address?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior or workflow you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches could address the same need?

## Environment and Context

Include relevant setup details, affected area, mockups, or screenshots. Do not include production data, API keys, tokens, passwords, or local runtime databases.
